executives.name: Bruce Kiddoo
executives.background: Bruce E. Kiddoo has served as a director since 2020. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Maxim Integrated Products, Inc. from 2007 to 2019.

executives.name: Manish Bhatia
executives.background: Manish Bhatia is Executive Vice President, Global Operations. He joined Micron in 2017 from Western Digital Corporation, where he held various executive roles in operations and supply chain.

executives.name: Olivier Leonetti
executives.background: Olivier Leonetti is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Eaton. He joined Eaton in 2024. Prior to joining Eaton, he served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Johnson Controls International plc from 2020 to 2024. He also served as CFO of Zebra Technologies and Western Digital.

executives.name: Siva Sivaram
executives.background: Dr. Sivaram has served as our Chief Executive Officer since February 2024 and as a member of our Board since September 2023. Prior to joining QuantumScape, he served as President of Western Digital Corp. from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President of Silicon Technology from 2016 to 2020. He previously held leadership roles at SanDisk and Matrix Semiconductor.

executives.name: Thomas Caulfield
executives.background: Dr. Caulfield is the President and Chief Executive Officer of GlobalFoundries. He joined the company in 2014 and was appointed CEO in 2018. Prior to GF, he served as President and COO of Soraa and held executive positions at Ausra and Novellus Systems. He spent 17 years at IBM in various leadership roles.

board_of_directors.name: Bruce Kiddoo
board_of_directors.background: Bruce E. Kiddoo has served as a director since 2020. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer of Maxim Integrated Products, Inc. from 2007 to 2019.
